action.reasoning: Observation: current best is the 10-model raw LightGBM ensemble at ic_mean=0.057296; the 20-model ensemble did not improve despite higher in-sample validation IC. Analysis: a low-cost next step is to test prediction-space ensemble transformations (per-day rank/z-score normalization) without retraining, because IC is cross-sectional and model scale differences can hurt averaging. Decision: update predict.py to support optional per-model daily rank/zscore transforms from metadata, create variant checkpoints referencing existing model files, and run local predictions to inspect which variant is worth submitting next.
action.command: python make_pred_variants.py --src checkpoints/ens_full_v2 --prefix checkpoints/v2 && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/v2_rank_each --output local_pred_v2_rank_each.json && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/v2_z_each --output local_pred_v2_z_each.json && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/v2_demean_each --output local_pred_v2_demean_each.json && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/v2_equal_raw --output local_pred_v2_equal_raw.json && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/v2_equal_rank_each --output local_pred_v2_equal_rank_each.json
